chunks.title: Grain Offering of Fine Flour
chunks.reason: Establishes the basic requirements for a grain offering and the priest's portion.

chunks.title: Baked Grain Offerings
chunks.reason: Details specific preparations for grain offerings baked in an oven, on a griddle, or in a pan.

chunks.title: Seasoning and Leaven Rules
chunks.reason: Sets prohibitions against leaven and honey while mandating the use of salt.

chunks.title: First Fruits Offering
chunks.reason: Describes the specific procedure for bringing early ripened grain as a grain offering.
